author: l03443
content: Just catching up with the thread now, you mean to be able to build on the first slot after the fork? Won’t we be able to just deposit before?

author: barnabasbusa
content: We are still working out exact details about how pre fork logic should work, as it’s not super straightforward

author: barnabasbusa
content: Right now we currently would need to wait 4 epochs post fork to get the builder deposits in a finalized state.

author: barnabasbusa
content: So for about 24-25 mins (assuming the fork goes smoothly) we would have no builders online. Which is pretty drastic for some dexes

author: l03443
content: Yeah would imagine that to be quite disruptive for defi

author: barnabasbusa
content: yeah.

author: l03443
content: And we can’t deposit before the fork as 0x03?

author: barnabasbusa
content: So we are thinking of different mechanism to also make it fair for all builders.

author: barnabasbusa
content: The beacon chain would only be able to interpret those deposits being done post fork, and at that point the fork epoch will be used as the deposit epoch, which will be unfinalized

author: barnabasbusa
content: so even tho you make the deposit before the fork, from the point of view of the beacon chain you made the deposit at the fork, and it needs to get finalized before it can be included

author: l03443
content: How about a mini fork just to enable deposits? Was discussed before

author: l03443
content: But adds some complexity for testing maybe

author: barnabasbusa
content:
So there are also 2 main issues with this:
- how can we make sure a single builder won’t fill the queue and try to keep everyone else out?
- how can we ensure that the dequeue logic is fair?

author: barnabasbusa
content: not really realistic tbh

author: l03443
content: Is it though? Even for fusaka we had BPO1 shortly after the main fork

author: nflaig
content: BDO = builder deposit only fork?

author: barnabasbusa
content:
So for these 2 questions, my proposal would be:
- each deposit made pre fork will never gonna be withdrawable (single 1 eth). So we avoid single builder dosing with bunch of 1 eth deposits pre fork and everyone just makes a single deposit (ideally).
- We shuffle the deposits with 0x03 at the fork.

author: barnabasbusa
content: BPOs themselves added probably months of delay to fulu.

author: barnabasbusa
content: It’s fairly radical change so late in the fork.

author: barnabasbusa
content: <@592004585506340885> what do you think of this?

author: l03443
content: What’s the limit of deposits?
